engineIntelligence.h2: Fiat Freemont Engines - Codes, Common Failures & Replacement Costs
engineIntelligence.description: The cards below cover the main engines fitted to the Fiat Freemont in the UK, including documented failure causes, variant production years, and typical rebuilt engine costs based on current UK market data.

cards.altText: Fiat Freemont 55263088 engine - diesel 2.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: EGR cooler failure - clogging causes loss of power and engine management light from 60k miles.
DPF regeneration issues - blocked filters on short-journey vehicles lead to limp mode.

cards.altText: Fiat Freemont 55279894 engine - diesel 2.0L replacement UK
knownFailures: High-pressure injection pump failure - metal contamination can write off the engine if not caught early.
EGR valve sticking - causes rough idle, poor acceleration and P0401 fault codes.

cards.altText: Fiat Freemont ERB engine - petrol 3.6L replacement UK
knownFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure - rattling noise on cold start, can cause catastrophic valve damage if ignored.
Oil consumption issues - worn piston rings on higher-mileage units lead to blue smoke.

engineGuide.h2: Fiat Freemont Engine Codes - Full Technical Specifications & Replacement Guide
engineGuide.h3: Every engine code fitted to the Fiat Freemont across all generations, with technical specs, compatible variants and trims, known failure points, and average rebuilt prices from UK specialists. Select any engine code to compare quotes.

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Entry-level 140hp Multijet, most common Freemont diesel; EGR/DPF issues dominate replacement enquiries.
commonFailures: EGR cooler clogging - causes loss of power and engine management light from 60k miles.
DPF regeneration failure - blocked filters on short-journey vehicles lead to limp mode.
Turbo actuator wear - whistling noise and reduced boost above 100k miles.
entries.cta: Get quotes for 55263088 Fiat Freemont engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel
entries.history: Higher-output 170hp Multijet with upgraded injection; pump failures and EGR issues drive demand.
compatibleVariants: Lounge, Black Code, SXT, Cross, 4x4 AWD
commonFailures: High-pressure injection pump failure - metal contamination can cause catastrophic engine damage.
EGR valve sticking - rough idle, poor acceleration and P0401/P2002 fault codes common.
Timing belt tensioner wear - interference engine requires belt change every 80k miles.
entries.cta: Get quotes for 55279894 Fiat Freemont engine replacement

entries.title: 2.0L Diesel (Euro 6)
entries.history: Late-model Euro 6 Multijet with AdBlue; improved emissions but similar EGR/DPF failure patterns.
compatibleVariants: Lounge, Black Code, Cross, Urban (facelift models)
commonFailures: AdBlue injector clogging - causes NOx sensor faults and limp mode on Euro 6 units.
EGR cooler leaks - coolant loss and overheating reported on higher-mileage examples.
DPF ash accumulation - requires professional cleaning or replacement after 120k miles.
entries.cta: Get quotes for 55280024 Fiat Freemont engine replacement

entries.title: 3.6L Petrol
entries.history: Shared Chrysler/Jeep/Fiat Pentastar V6; timing chain tensioner failure is the dominant replacement driver.
commonFailures: Timing chain tensioner failure - rattling noise on cold start, can cause valve damage if ignored.
Oil consumption issues - worn piston rings on higher-mileage units lead to blue smoke.
Water pump leakage - coolant loss at front of engine, often requires engine removal to access.
entries.cta: Get quotes for ERB Fiat Freemont engine replacement

entries.title: 2.4L Petrol
entries.history: Rare 2.4L four-cylinder petrol; limited UK availability means higher scarcity pricing on replacements.
commonFailures: Variable valve timing solenoid failure - causes rough idle and loss of power on acceleration.
Oil sludge buildup - missed service intervals lead to camshaft wear and reduced oil pressure.
Thermostat housing leaks - plastic housing cracks with age, causing coolant loss.
entries.cta: Get quotes for ED3 Fiat Freemont engine replacement

Every rebuilt engine comes with a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

commonProblems.h2: Fiat Freemont Engine Problems - What It Costs to Fix & When Replacement Makes Sense
commonProblems.h3: The Fiat Freemont's 2.0 Multijet diesel dominates UK replacement enquiries, with EGR and DPF failures the most common causes. The 3.6L Pentastar V6 suffers timing chain tensioner issues. Every rebuilt engine supplied through EngineMarket includes upgraded internal components designed to address the original failure point - plus a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty.

problems.h4: Fiat Freemont EGR Valve Failure - Why 2.0 Multijet Engines Lose Power
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Freemont Urban, Lounge, Cross, Black Code (2011-2019, 55263088 & 55279894)
problems.rootCause: Exhaust gas recirculation cooler clogs with carbon deposits, restricting flow and triggering engine management faults.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Remove and clean EGR valve/cooler or install blanking plate to prevent recirculation.
repairOptions.longevity: Temporary fix; may resolve symptoms but doesn't address underlying wear. Best for pre-80k mile units.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Fit new or reconditioned EGR assembly with updated cooler design; includes labour and coding.
repairOptions.longevity: Reliable medium-term solution; updated parts reduce recurrence risk. Suitable if engine otherwise healthy.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt 2.0 Multijet with upgraded EGR components, bench tested, 12-month warranty.
repairOptions.longevity: Best value for high-mileage Freemonts (£2k-£4k residual); addresses all wear items at once.

problems.recommendation: On a Freemont worth £2,000-£4,000, a full rebuilt engine often represents better long-term value than repeated EGR repairs. If the vehicle has under 80k miles and is otherwise sound, EGR replacement may suffice.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt 2.0 Multijet engine prices for your Fiat Freemont

problems.h4: Fiat Freemont DPF Clogging - Why Diesel Particulate Filters Fail
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Freemont all 2.0 Multijet variants (2011-2019, Euro 5 & Euro 6)
problems.rootCause: Short-journey driving prevents active regeneration; soot accumulates beyond cleaning capacity, triggering limp mode.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Off-vehicle chemical cleaning or forced regeneration to remove accumulated soot.
repairOptions.longevity: Effective if filter not physically damaged; best as preventative maintenance every 60k miles.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Fit new or reconditioned DPF unit; includes sensors, labour and ECU adaptation.
repairOptions.longevity: Reliable fix if engine otherwise healthy; ensure EGR issues are addressed first to prevent recurrence.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt 2.0 Multijet with clean DPF and updated EGR; bench tested, 12-month warranty.
repairOptions.longevity: Most economical for high-mileage units; resolves DPF, EGR and general wear in one package.

problems.recommendation: DPF cleaning is worth trying first if the vehicle has good service history and under 100k miles. For Freemonts over 120k miles or with concurrent EGR issues, a rebuilt engine offers better value and peace of mind.
problems.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Freemont diesel engine replacement with clean DPF

problems.group: Fiat Freemont Timing Chain Tensioner Failure
problems.h4: Fiat Freemont Timing Chain Tensioner Failure - Why 3.6L V6 Engines Rattle
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Freemont SXT, Lounge V6 (2011-2019, ERB Pentastar)
problems.rootCause: Hydraulic tensioner loses pressure; chain slack causes rattling on cold start and potential valve/piston contact.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Replace hydraulic tensioner and guides; requires front engine cover removal.
repairOptions.longevity: Risky if chain has stretched; may not prevent recurrence. Only suitable for early-warning cases under 90k miles.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt Pentastar V6 with updated tensioner, chain and guides; bench tested, 12-month warranty.
repairOptions.longevity: Recommended for any V6 Freemont with rattling; addresses root cause and all associated wear items.

problems.recommendation: Pentastar timing chain failure is often catastrophic. If you hear rattling on cold start, budget for a rebuilt engine - attempting a tensioner-only repair risks valve damage and higher costs.
problems.cta: Compare rebuilt Pentastar V6 engine prices for your Fiat Freemont

problems.h4: Fiat Freemont Injection Pump Failure - Why 170hp Multijet Engines Seize
problems.affectedModels: Fiat Freemont Lounge, Black Code, SXT (2011-2019, 55279894 170hp)
problems.rootCause: High-pressure pump wear releases metal particles into fuel system; particles score injectors and cylinder walls.

repairOptions.whatItInvolves: Supply and fit rebuilt 2.0 Multijet 170hp with new injection pump, injectors and fuel lines; bench tested, 12-month warranty.
repairOptions.longevity: Only viable option once metal contamination occurs; prevents repeat failure and protects new components.

problems.recommendation: Injection pump failure on the 170hp Multijet is typically terminal. If metal particles are confirmed in the fuel system, a rebuilt engine with new pump and injectors is the only reliable solution.
problems.cta: Get quotes for 55279894 Fiat Freemont engine replacement with new injection pump

finalCta.h4: Don't Let Engine Failure Write Off Your Fiat Freemont
finalCta.paragraph: EGR, DPF, timing chain and injection pump failures are the most common reasons Freemont owners seek engine replacement. EngineMarket makes it simple to compare prices from trusted UK Fiat Freemont specialists who supply rebuilt units with upgraded components addressing these known weaknesses. Every engine includes a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty and nationwide delivery options. Compare quotes today and get back on the road without the main dealer premium.
finalCta.buttonText: Compare Fiat Freemont Engine Replacement Prices Now →
finalCta.disclaimer: All prices are indicative UK market ranges based on historical quote data and repair requests from our network of engine specialists. Dealer pricing is estimated based on published main dealer labour rates and genuine OEM parts pricing. Specialist pricing reflects actual quote data from EngineMarket's UK network. Actual costs vary depending on damage severity, vehicle condition, variant, and workshop location within the UK. Use our free comparison tool to get tailored quotes for your specific Fiat Freemont and engine code. Every engine supplied through EngineMarket carries a minimum 12‑month unlimited mileage warranty - always confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier.

engineSizes.h2: Fiat Freemont Engines by Size - Find the Right Displacement for Your Variant
engineSizes.intro: Every displacement fitted to the Fiat Freemont in the UK is listed below, with compatible engine codes, production years and common failure notes to help you identify the right replacement.

items.title: Fiat Freemont 2.0L Diesel Engines
items.description: The 2.0L Multijet diesel powered the vast majority of UK Fiat Freemonts from launch in 2011 through to end of production in 2019. Offered in 140hp and 170hp outputs, this engine family dominates replacement enquiries due to well-documented EGR and DPF vulnerabilities on higher-mileage examples.
commonFailurePoints: high-pressure injection pump wear on 170hp units
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Freemont 2.0L diesel engines

items.title: Fiat Freemont 2.4L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 2.4L World Engine four-cylinder petrol was a rare option on early pre-facelift Fiat Freemonts, primarily fitted to base Pop and Urban trims between 2011-2014. Limited UK availability means replacement units command scarcity pricing, but the engine is generally robust if serviced correctly.
commonFailurePoints: oil sludge buildup from missed services
items.cta: Compare Fiat Freemont 2.4L petrol engine prices

items.title: Fiat Freemont 3.6L Petrol Engines
items.description: The 3.6L Pentastar V6 represented the performance flagship for Fiat Freemont, shared across the Chrysler/Jeep/Fiat alliance. While offering strong power and refinement, timing chain tensioner failure is a well-documented weakness that drives most replacement enquiries for this variant.
commonFailurePoints: Timing chain tensioner failure causing cold-start rattling
items.cta: Compare Fiat Freemont 3.6L petrol engine prices

engineSizes.closing: Not sure which engine size your Fiat Freemont needs? Enter your registration number above - we'll identify the exact displacement, engine code and compatible replacement options instantly. engineYears.h2: Fiat Freemont Engines by Year - What Was Fitted & When
engineYears.intro: This technical timeline covers all major engine changes across the Fiat Freemont's UK production run (2011-2019), organised so owners can quickly identify their engine and compare rebuilt prices from UK specialists.

years.description: Launch generation based on Dodge Journey JC platform; 2.0 Multijet diesel dominates with 140/170hp outputs, rare 2.4L petrol and 3.6L V6 options.
keyChanges: Fiat Freemont launched in UK as rebadged Dodge Journey (JC platform)
2.0L Multijet diesel offered in 140hp (55263088) and 170hp (55279894) outputs
Rare 2.4L World Engine petrol (ED3) and 3.6L Pentastar V6 (ERB) available on select trims
Urban, Lounge, Pop and SXT trim levels introduced with 2WD and 4x4 AWD options
knownFor: EGR cooler clogging emerges as dominant failure pattern on 2.0 Multijet diesels
DPF regeneration issues reported on short-journey vehicles from 70k miles
Pentastar V6 timing chain tensioner rattling noted on cold starts above 80k miles
Strong residual values early in lifecycle; depreciation accelerates post-2014
years.cta: Get quotes for 2011-2014 Fiat Freemont replacement engines
years.ticker: Fiat Freemont 2.0 diesel engine replacement • EGR valve failure Freemont • Pentastar timing chain Freemont

years.description: Mid-life facelift introduced Euro 6 emissions compliance; updated Multijet engines (55280024) with AdBlue on diesel variants, V6 petrol continues unchanged.
keyChanges: Facelift styling updates and revised interior trim across all variants
Euro 6 emissions compliance mandatory; 2.0 Multijet updated to 55280024 code with AdBlue
Black Code special edition launched with exclusive styling and 170hp Multijet
Cross variant introduced with rugged styling and 4x4 AWD as standard
mainEngines: 55280024 - 2.0L diesel 140/170hp Euro 6 with AdBlue (Urban, Lounge, Cross, Black Code)
ERB - 3.6L petrol 276hp Pentastar V6 (SXT, Lounge V6 - unchanged)
knownFor: AdBlue injector clogging emerges as new failure point on Euro 6 Multijet engines
EGR cooler issues persist despite updated design; DPF maintenance remains critical
Pentastar V6 timing chain tensioner failures continue to drive V6 replacement demand
Residual values stabilise for well-maintained examples; high-mileage units face scrappage decisions
years.cta: Get quotes for 2015-2019 Fiat Freemont replacement engines
years.ticker: Freemont Euro 6 engine replacement • AdBlue injector failure Freemont • Black Code engine price

faq.h2: Fiat Freemont Engine Replacement - Frequently Asked Questions

items.question: How much does it cost to replace a Fiat Freemont engine?
items.answer: Typical rebuilt Fiat Freemont engine costs range from £1,200-£2,800 for 2.0 Multijet diesel and £2,500-£4,500 for 3.6L Pentastar V6 petrol, supply only. Supply & fit adds £400-£900 labour depending on location.
keyPoints: 2.0L Multijet diesel rebuilt: £1,200-£2,800 supply only
3.6L Pentastar V6 rebuilt: £2,500-£4,500 supply only
Supply & fit labour typically adds £400-£900 to engine price
Used engines available from £800 but carry higher risk
items.cta: Compare Fiat Freemont engine replacement prices today

items.question: Is it worth replacing the engine on a Fiat Freemont?
items.answer: Yes, if your Freemont is otherwise sound and valued over £2,000. A rebuilt engine (£1,200-£2,800) often represents better value than scrapping a £2k-£4k vehicle, especially with a 12-month warranty.
keyPoints: Freemont residual values typically £2,000-£4,000 for high-mileage examples
Rebuilt 2.0 Multijet costs £1,200-£2,800, often less than vehicle value
12-month warranty on rebuilt units provides peace of mind
Consider body condition, MOT history and service records before deciding
items.cta: Get a tailored quote for your Fiat Freemont engine replacement

items.question: Will a Dodge Journey engine fit a Fiat Freemont?
items.answer: Yes. Fiat Freemont and Dodge Journey share the identical JC platform and engine fitments. Engines with matching codes (55263088, 55279894, ERB) are directly interchangeable between models.
keyPoints: Freemont is a rebadged Dodge Journey on shared JC platform
Engine codes 55263088, 55279894, ERB fit both models identically
Verify ECU compatibility and wiring harness match before fitting
Source engines from either model to expand availability and reduce cost
items.cta: Compare Dodge Journey and Fiat Freemont engine prices

items.question: What are the signs of EGR failure on a Fiat Freemont 2.0 Multijet?
items.answer: Loss of power, rough idle, engine management light with P0401/P2002 codes, and excessive black smoke indicate EGR cooler clogging on Freemont 2.0 Multijet engines.
keyPoints: Engine management light with P0401 (EGR flow) or P2002 (DPF) codes
Noticeable loss of power and poor acceleration, especially under load
Rough idle or stalling when coming to a stop
Excessive black smoke from exhaust during acceleration
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Freemont EGR repair or engine replacement

items.question: Do Fiat Freemont engines have timing belts or chains?
items.answer: The 2.0L Multijet diesel uses a timing belt requiring replacement every 80,000 miles or 5 years. The 3.6L Pentastar V6 petrol uses a timing chain with known tensioner failure risks.
keyPoints: 2.0L Multijet diesel: timing belt, replace every 80k miles or 5 years
3.6L Pentastar V6 petrol: timing chain with hydraulic tensioner
Belt failure on Multijet causes catastrophic interference engine damage
Chain tensioner failure on V6 causes cold-start rattling and potential valve damage
items.cta: Compare timing belt service and engine replacement quotes for Freemont

items.question: Can I fit a 3.6L V6 engine to my 2.0L Multijet Freemont?
items.answer: Technically possible but not recommended. Major modifications to gearbox, wiring loom, ECU and subframe would be required, making it prohibitively expensive versus sourcing the correct 2.0L replacement.
keyPoints: V6 swap requires different gearbox, wiring harness and ECU programming
Subframe and mounting points differ between diesel and V6 applications
Cost of conversion far exceeds price of correct 2.0L rebuilt engine
Insurance and MOT implications make conversion impractical for road use
items.cta: Get quotes for the correct 2.0L Multijet engine for your Freemont

items.question: How long does a Fiat Freemont engine replacement take?
items.answer: Typical supply & fit turnaround is 2-4 working days once the engine is sourced. Supply-only engines can be delivered nationwide within 24-48 hours for self-installation.
keyPoints: Engine sourcing: 24-48 hours for common codes like 55263088
Supply & fit installation: 1-2 days labour at specialist garage
Post-installation testing and ECU adaptation: half-day additional
Total typical turnaround: 2-4 working days from order to collection
items.cta: Find Fiat Freemont engine supply & fit deals near you

items.question: Do you supply Fiat Freemont engines with a warranty?
items.answer: Yes. Every rebuilt, reconditioned or remanufactured Fiat Freemont engine supplied through EngineMarket includes a minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty from UK specialists.
keyPoints: Minimum 12-month unlimited mileage warranty standard on rebuilt units
Warranty covers parts and labour for manufacturing defects
Confirm exact terms with your chosen supplier before purchase
Used engines may carry shorter warranty periods; verify before buying
items.cta: Compare Fiat Freemont engine warranty terms from UK suppliers

items.question: What oil should I use in a Fiat Freemont 2.0 Multijet?
items.answer: Use 5W-30 fully synthetic ACEA C3 specification oil for Euro 6 Multijet engines (55280024), or 5W-40 ACEA B4 for pre-Euro 6 units (55263088/55279894). Always check your owner's manual.
keyPoints: Euro 6 (55280024): 5W-30 fully synthetic, ACEA C3 specification
Pre-Euro 6 (55263088/55279894): 5W-40 fully synthetic, ACEA B4
Oil capacity approximately 5.5 litres including filter change
Use only oils meeting Fiat 9.55535 specification to protect DPF/EGR
items.cta: Get quotes for Fiat Freemont engine replacement with correct oil spec

items.question: Where can I find my Fiat Freemont engine code?
items.answer: The engine code is stamped on the cylinder block near the bellhousing, visible from the driver's side wheel arch. It also appears on the VIN plate and V5C registration document.
keyPoints: Stamped on cylinder block near bellhousing, driver's side wheel arch
Listed on vehicle VIN plate under bonnet or door shut
Appears on V5C registration document under section D.2
items.cta: Get quotes using your exact Fiat Freemont engine code today
